title: Sorting a Group via the API
excerpt: Is there a way in the API to sort a column programmatically? Im using Asp.Net Core and since i’m updating big chunks of data in the group at the same time, sorting the list in C# is useless.

posts.author: CacttusMan (Chris Godin)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way in the API to sort a column programmatically? Im using Asp.Net Core and since i’m updating big chunks of data in the group at the same time, sorting the list in C# is useless.

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @CacttusMan – at the moment there’s no way to sort a board via the API. However, you can do this via the UI: Sorting your items

Let me know if that helps

posts.author: CacttusMan (Chris Godin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to sort the board when an item is added? If I already sorted the board and I add an item, it won’t sort itself in the board. Since I want to automate the filling of the board, how can I sort them without clicking the sort button each time I add an item?

Will you eventually include a sorting in your api?
